svg.text: The sub-function byte — 1 byte, 8 bits (Clause 8.2.2, Table 11)
Present only in services that define one — exactly one byte, in A_Data.Parameter 1 right after the SID. SPRMIB = suppressPosRspMsgIndicationBit.
Server sends a positive response (or a negative response with an NRC).
Server suppresses the positive response — negative responses are still sent (7.5).
The service runs either way. A positive response echoes bits 6–0 with bit 7 cleared.
